prestazioni: Replacement of the original **Tipo 015** 3.0L flat-12 engine with a **Ferrari 312B-derived Tipo 001/12** block, bored to 3.2L (92.0mm bore x 60.0mm stroke) and fitted with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (12.5:1 compression ratio) for increased rev ceiling to 14,500 RPM, paired with **Titanium connecting rods** from **Pankl Racing Systems** and a **billet crankshaft** machined by **Hepolite** to reduce reciprocating mass by 18%.

Installation of a **custom dry-sump lubrication system** by **Moroso Performance**, featuring a **dual-stage scavenge pump** (12 GPM capacity) with **aerospace-grade -3AN braided lines** and a **separate 10-quart oil reservoir** mounted in the left sidepod, reducing oil starvation in high-G corners and lowering the engine’s center of gravity by 45mm. The system includes a **Canton Racing Products oil accumulator** to prevent pressure loss during gear shifts.

Replacement of the original **Weber 48 IDF carburetors** with a **Lucas Mechanical Fuel Injection (MFI) system**, utilizing **12 individual throttle bodies (ITBs)** (42mm diameter) from **Jenvey Dynamics**, paired with a **custom-machined intake manifold** in **6061-T6 aluminum** by **Radical Performance Engines**. The system is tuned via a **Motec M800 ECU** with **individual cylinder trims** and a **dual-stage ignition system** (NGK Iridium IX spark plugs with **MSD 85642 ignition coils**), optimizing fuel delivery for 550+ HP at 14,000 RPM.
estetica: Replacement of the original **fiberglass nosecone** with a **carbon-fiber replica** (2x2 twill weave, 3K finish) from **Ferrari Classiche**, featuring **integrated NACA ducts** for brake cooling and a **removable Gurney flap** (adjustable from 5mm to 15mm) for aerodynamic tuning. The nose is finished in **Ferrari Rosso Corsa (PPG D8122)** with **hand-painted Scuderia Ferrari logos** in **3M vinyl (Scotchcal 190-50)** for authenticity.

Installation of a **custom rear wing** designed by **AeroTech Racing**, constructed from **autoclave-cured pre-preg carbon fiber** (T700 fiber) with a **dual-element airfoil** (NACA 63A012 profile) and **adjustable endplates** (0° to 12° angle of attack). The wing is mounted via **titanium A-arm supports** (Grade 5, 6Al-4V) and includes **integrated DRS (Drag Reduction System)** activated via a **hydraulic actuator** (Bosch Rexroth) controlled by the Motec ECU.

Replacement of the original **steel roll cage** with a **T45 chromoly tubular cage** by **Sparco Pro2000**, featuring **gusseted joints** and **integrated fire suppression system mounts** (for a **Lifeline Zero 360 system**). The cage is powder-coated in **Ferrari Giallo Modena (PPG D8124)** and includes **removable door bars** for driver egress, while the **original leather-wrapped steering wheel** is retrofitted with a **MOMO Mod.78** quick-release hub and **Alcantara grips** (stitched with **Ferrari red contrast thread**).
